item.title: Hello World
item.description: It’s very interesting sometimes to test Golang blogging platforms This is a sample YAML manifest 😄 {{- if (and (ne (.Values.ui.ingress.enabled | toString ) "-") .Values.ui.ingress.enabled) }} {{- $serviceName := printf "%s-%s" (include "vault.fullname" .) "ui" -}} apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1 kind: Ingress metadata: name: {{ template "vault.fullname" . }}-ingress namespace: {{ .Release.Namespace }} labels: app: {{ template "vault.name" . }} chart: {{ template "vault.chart" . }} heritage: {{ .Release.Service }} release: {{ .

item.title: About
item.description: What started as a curiosity to decompose everything as a child, materialised itself into the first computer I owned. That’s when I was continously breaking and fixing it multiple times made me discover how everything works. I’m Daniel, a Site Reliability Engineer working @ GfK SE based in Germany, let me invite you into my world ✨ My experience 😎 The first real IT job I landed was a Ruby on Rails developer at MarketsWorld which was a trading platform based in Isle of Man 🇬🇧.
